context: Tests whether the agent preserves SwiftUI animation skill boundaries while giving useful animation guidance.

checklist.name: Scoped animation ownership
checklist.description: Says the animation skill owns replacing broad `.animation(.default)` with scoped `.animation(_:body:)`, `.animation(_:value:)`, or explicit `withAnimation` where appropriate.

checklist.name: Content transition example
checklist.description: Shows `contentTransition(.numericText(...))` paired with an explicit or value-bound animation for the numeric score.

checklist.name: Shared-element boundary
checklist.description: Keeps shared-element guidance to matched geometry or navigation zoom animation hookup without implementing full navigation architecture.

checklist.name: Sibling routing
checklist.description: Routes detailed NavigationStack/deep-link work to `swiftui-navigation` and custom grid/layout details to `swiftui-layout-components`.

checklist.name: Profiling boundary
checklist.description: Routes broader GPU/layout profiling to a debugging or Instruments-focused skill and avoids turning the answer into a full profiling workflow.
